because.text: Adopted per Decision Process: design gate 3/3 (Gemini/Codex/Kimi, blind convergence on selection-only; F1.5 profiles rejected 2:1 as a governance backdoor; the author's F3 died round 1 to verified non-associativity of interfere) followed by a full implementation gate (Codex round 1 BLOCKED with a real oracle ordering bug + 4 more P1s -> all fixed in-adjudication -> Gemini round 2 verified line-by-line, ready-to-anchor verdict, whitespace P2 adopted). Shipped: Book III anchored (assertion blob schema with embedded jurisdiction roots, six-step selection derivation with normative Unicode-scalar collation, ConflictSet no-merge client rule, AnnotationViewID coordinate + assertion_set_root set commitment, proof-supports-facts-policy-meters-weight, ten gate criteria as conformance obligations, protocol-level aggregation profiles forbidden); Book II s10 federation bridge (waves = per-jurisdiction per-policy derived coordinates, divergence permanent by design, s6 pins = null-jurisdiction defaults); impl/sigma_federation.py reference + impl-go/ second implementation (own LUT generation against the Book II arbiter), federation_vectors.json 21 vectors / 37 checks, differential 40/40 incl. astral actors and whitespace metadata. Book I untouched: FV-BOOK-I-UNREACHABLE makes the boundary executable. Anchors: new v0.6.0 section, book-3 anchored for the first time.

subject.note: ADOPT ADR-006 in v0.6.0 (Book III: FEDERATION anchored - F1-strict selection-only, two implementations differential-tested)
